name: OpenBuild
fullText:
1200+ registered, 200+ showed up, and we literally ran out of space 🔥   
Shenzhen builders came out in force today. Had to turn people away at the door - sorry to everyone who couldn't get in!  

The energy in that room was insane. This is what a real builder community looks https://t.co/FM4n459QEV

name: 0xkevin (🖤 , 💙)
fullText:
https://t.co/yjBH869713 最近搞的 「Meme 十期打新计划」，第一期打了个开门红

首个项目 $SC 认购金额超过 1.03 亿 USDT，参与人数 1 万+，最后超募 一万倍以上。上线之后价格最高冲到 1.35 USDT，从认购价算，涨幅直接到了 13.5 万倍。

第一期刚结束，第二期 Punch the Monkey（$PUNCH） https://t.co/WNs7CF6M2W
